name: localshare
description: Cross-platform local network HTTP file host prototype

scripts.package:linux-x64: npm run build && pkg . --public --no-bytecode --target node18-linux-x64 --output release/localshare-linux-x64
scripts.package:macos-arm64: npm run build && pkg . --public --no-bytecode --target node18-macos-arm64 --output release/localshare-macos-arm64
scripts.package:macos-x64: npm run build && pkg . --public --no-bytecode --target node18-macos-x64 --output release/localshare-macos-x64-intel
scripts.package:windows-x64: npm run build && pkg . --public --no-bytecode --target node18-win-x64 --output release/localshare-win-x64.exe
